name: Red Pepper Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Red bell pepper chopped fine
1/2 tsp Sambal oelek, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until evenly distributed.
3. Makes about 2 cups.
4. Store for short periods in the refrigerator.
5. Serve with chicken, beef, or blue corn tortilla chips.
